headline: Charles River Highlights Effectiveness of VCGs in Toxicology
summary: WILMINGTON, Mass., April 21, 2026--Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) has shared the results of a retrospective analysis in Regulatory Toxicology and Pharmacology, showing that virtual control groups (VCGs) can preserve scientific integrity while reducing reliance on animal models. The review, which looked at 20 toxicology studies that replaced concurrent control groups (CCGs) with curated VCGs, and compared the outcomes across study-level decisions and detailed endpoints
